form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign when last of 8 at Kempton Park All Weather December 10 over 1400m, 3.5 len behind Beccadelli with 56kg at $8. When resuming last campaign second in a small field at this track November 25 over 1200m, 1.3 len behind Master Of Shanghai with 59kg at $3.80. Can return with a bold run.
